name: Ana García
summary: Backend developer with 5 years of experience in Python and FastAPI. Has worked at fintech startups and is an expert in REST architectures and PostgreSQL databases.

name: Carlos López
summary: Fullstack engineer with experience in React and Node.js. Has led teams of 4 people and has a background in e-commerce and SaaS platforms.

name: María Fernández
summary: Data scientist with 4 years of experience in machine learning and Python. Skilled in scikit-learn, pandas, and building predictive models for retail analytics.

name: Javier Torres
summary: DevOps engineer specialized in Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines. Has managed cloud infrastructure on AWS for high-traffic applications and is proficient in Terraform.

name: Laura Sánchez
summary: Frontend developer with 3 years of experience building responsive UIs with React and TypeScript. Passionate about accessibility and design systems.

name: Andrés Martínez
summary: Mobile developer with expertise in React Native and Flutter. Has shipped apps with over 100k downloads on both iOS and Android platforms.

name: Sofía Ruiz
summary: Data engineer with experience building ETL pipelines using Apache Spark and Airflow. Has worked in the healthcare sector processing large volumes of structured and unstructured data.

name: Diego Herrera
summary: Backend developer specializing in Java and Spring Boot. Has 6 years of experience building microservices for banking and insurance companies.

name: Valentina Gómez
summary: Full-stack developer with strong skills in Vue.js and Django. Has worked on government digital transformation projects and is experienced with Docker and Linux environments.

name: Mateo Jiménez
summary: Cloud architect with certifications in AWS and GCP. Has designed multi-region architectures for SaaS startups and is experienced in cost optimization and security best practices.

name: Isabella Morales
summary: Machine learning engineer focused on NLP and LLMs. Has fine-tuned transformer models and deployed inference APIs using FastAPI and Hugging Face on production systems.

name: Tomás Castillo
summary: QA engineer with 5 years of experience in test automation using Selenium, Pytest, and Cypress. Has implemented end-to-end testing frameworks for agile teams in telecommunications.
